---
---

## Slide 1 - Highlighted code block

```python
x = 1
print(x)
```

## Slide 2 - Plain code block

```
plain text block
no language here
```

## Slide 3 - Multiple code blocks

```python
a = 1
```

```r
b <- 2
```

## Slide 4 - Code block alongside image

```python
hello = "world"
```

![](../image.png)

## Slide 5 - Code block alongside paragraph

A paragraph next to a code block.

```python
foo = bar
```
